en: Yeah? Like on Monstropolis' Most Wanted?
You've been jealous of my good looks since the fourth grade, pal. Have a good day, sweetie.
Okay, Sully, hop on in. Nope. Hey, hey, hey, hey, hey. Where'd you go? What are you doing?
What are you doing? Might need a scream shortage. We're walking. Walking? Yep. No.
No, no. My baby, look. She needs to be driven. Hi, baby.
I'll call you. Hey, genius, you want to know why I bought the car?
Huh? Not really. To drive it. You know, like on the street with the honk-honk and the boom-boom and no walking involved?
Give it a rest. Will ya, butterball? Come on. You could use the exercise.
I could use the exercise. Look at you. You have your own climate.
Hammock, tentacles, down the road. Morning, Michael. Morning, Michael. Morning, Sally.
Hey, morning, kids. How you doing? Bye, Mike.
Ah, nuts. La, la, la, la, la, la, la, la, la, la.
